title: Norway braces for verdict in rape trial of crown princess's son Høiby
summary_full: Marius Borg Høiby will appear via video link, almost three months after his trial came to an end on 40 charges, including four counts of rape.
summary_public: Marius Borg Høiby will appear via video link, almost three months after his trial came to an end on 40 charges, including four counts of rape.

NO.label: neutral
NO.evidence: Norway braces for verdict in rape trial
